meaning: n.[鐢焆楠ㄥ寲,(鎬濇兂绛夌殑)鍍靛寲
examples: Which is from ossification of water in galaxy.
The most likely cause of sphenoid dysplasia is defective ossification of the sphenoid bone.
It is common to have calcification and metaplastic ossification in a given adamantinomatous craniopharyngioma.
America and her institutions have thrived on a powerful combination of innovation and intentional ossification.
Yet if Europe continues along its path of ossification and muddle, the outcome will be far worse.
